name: Short Stories
short_description: Determined to become the greatest thief of all time, Foxy decides to start his life of crime and theft. And what would be the quickest way to start your new life goal? Stealing chickens of course!
detailed_description:
Foxy wants to be rich but hates work.

She continually thought about how to make money easily, quickly and without much effort. To do this, she needed to focus on a plan and put it into action.

While thinking she heard a rooster crowing on a distant farm, and a small idea started to form in her head ...


- Use your stealth and don't get caught.
- Steal all the chickens and leave without being seen.
